query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS music_review_sessions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  startedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  endedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 45x8Wz3k6WBARWw.root --database C3bFVoBEaMVXmYZLRysziz --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS music_review_sessions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  startedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  endedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
